title: AI Provider State Published
description: Full snapshot of a user's AI provider configuration from one app, used for cross-app diff and migration awareness.

user_email.description: Email of the user whose providers are being published

source_app.description: Application that owns these provider settings

providers.description: Complete list of the user's AI providers in this app

id.description: Provider setting ID in the source app

label.description: User-assigned label for this provider config

preferred_model.description: Preferred model name for this provider

org_name.description: Organization name (e.g., for GitHub org-attributed inference)

is_active.description: Whether this provider is currently active/enabled

has_key.description: Whether an API key is configured (never contains the actual key)
